title: Windows cmd /c memory launcher is BLOCK

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/memory/README.md (cmd /c)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: A cmd shell entrypoint is arbitrary command execution regardless of the benign package it currently launches, so it blocks.
knownLimitations: No broad path here; the shell entrypoint alone is the blocking surface.
